description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with test and deploy stages using a .default template that runs ./gitlab-ci/setup.sh before each job, caches vendor/bundle/ keyed by $CI_BUILD_NAME, and sets BUNDLE_CACHE variable to vendor/bundle/. Add a test job in the test stage that uses a matrix of ruby images (ruby:2.1 through ruby:3.4) via the $IMAGE variable, runs bundle exec rspec, uploads a Cobertura coverage report at coverage/coverage.xml with a coverage regex /LOC \(([\d.]+)%\) covered/, and runs only on merge request events or when the commit branch equals the default branch. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that extends .default, uses the ruby image, runs only on the master branch and not on tags, executes bundle exec yard, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Ensure the pipeline respects the defined stages and variables.
